payload.claim_text: The ATS-A system provides centralized train traffic control, real-time train tracking, automated vehicle identification, and computer-aided automatic routing and dispatching for NYC Transit's A-Division subway lines.
payload.subject: ATS-A system
payload.description: Description of the Automatic Train Supervision system on A-Division

payload.claim_text: The ATS-A system authorizes and controls train movements and is critical to the safe operation of the A-Division.
payload.subject: ATS-A system
payload.description: ATS-A is critical to safe A-Division operation

payload.claim_text: Siemens is uniquely qualified to maintain the system, as designer and developer of both the system hardware and software.
payload.subject: Siemens Mobility, Inc
payload.description: Siemens is the sole-source provider for ATS-A maintenance because they designed the system

payload.claim_text: PA/CIS II is a public-facing system that delivers real-time train arrival as well as service disruption information and public service announcements to NYC Transit's ridership.
payload.subject: PA/CIS II system
payload.description: Description of the Public Address/Customer Information Signs System Phase II

payload.claim_text: PA/CIS II now delivers audio and visual data to 177 stations along the A Division lines including 21 stations on the Flushing line. Audio and visual public announcements are delivered to 99 stations along the B Division lines.
payload.subject: PA/CIS II system
payload.description: PA/CIS II station coverage details

tool_args.label: AAR Scope Change - TLC vehicles excluded

payload.claim_text: The Scope of Work has been modified to exclude the use of TLC vehicles going forward in order to maximize NYC Transit's ability to leverage the supplemental fleet to meet the growing demand for paratransit service, including lift-equipped vehicles.
payload.subject: Access-A-Ride Paratransit Supplemental Service
payload.description: Scope change excluding TLC-regulated vehicles from new contracts

payload.claim_text: Payment will be based on actual VSHs performed from daily manifest(s) provided by Paratransit, instead of guaranteed 10-hour per-vehicle shift.
payload.subject: Access-A-Ride Paratransit Supplemental Service
payload.description: Change from guaranteed 10-hour per-vehicle shift to actual VSH-based payment

tool_args.label: MWBE and SDVOB Goals for AAR Contracts

payload.claim_text: 15 percent MBE, 15 percent WBE, and 6 percent SDVOB goals
payload.subject: AAR Paratransit Supplemental Service contracts
payload.description: MWBE and SDVOB goals established for the contracts
